data.body:
## Reference: everything-claude-code Instinct-to-Skill Pipeline

everything-claude-code (131k stars on GitHub) implements an instinct-to-skill pipeline that is directly relevant to this epic:

- **`/learn`** captures patterns mid-session as "instincts" — lightweight, scored records of domain-specific learned behavior
- Each instinct has a **confidence score** tracking reliability; low-confidence instincts are candidates for pruning
- **`/prune`** expires instincts with 30-day TTL that haven't been reinforced
- **`/evolve`** clusters related instincts using deterministic clustering, then promotes the cluster into a formalized skill
- **`/instinct-import` / `/instinct-export`** enables sharing instincts across projects or team members

The pipeline is: `observation → instinct → cluster → skill → rules`. This is effectively a skill factory that generates its own new capabilities from usage patterns.

Reference: https://github.com/affaan-m/everything-claude-code
